hero.title: The Valley
hero.subtitle: A Private Village Above the Clouds
hero.body1: A private mountain village with individual cabins, a historic stone house, and shared outdoor spaces in the Rhodope Mountains.
hero.body2: Designed for quiet, privacy, and comfort, with heating, hot water, and year-round access.

editorial.title: The Secret Valley
editorial.lead: A mountain village where each stay is private, but the land is shared.
editorial.storyIntro: Several cabins, a stone house, and shared outdoor spaces. Private stays, shared land.

altitude.title: Altitude and views
altitude.text: 1,550m above sea level. Panoramic mountain vistas.

fire.title: Fire, hot tub, stargazing
fire.text: Communal fire pit, hot tub, exceptional stargazing.

adventure.title: Adventure base
adventure.text: ATV trails, hiking routes, mountain exploration.

captions.fireside: The communal Stone House at The Valley, a shared gathering space for guests to connect, cook, and relax together.
captions.panoramaVillage: The Valley at 1,550m altitude, a mountain village where each stay is private but the land is shared.
captions.summerVillage: A small, walkable mountain village where each stay is private, but the land itself is shared.

luxury-cabin.title: Luxury Cabin
bullets: Full comfort with heating and modern amenities

stone-house.title: Stone House
bullets: Historic stone construction with generous shared spaces
Perfect for families or small groups

a-frames.title: A-Frames
bullets: Perfect for solo travelers or couples

vibe.title: The Vibe
vibe.statement: Unstructured days. Hike, read, cook, sit by the fire.
vibe.comparisonCaption: The Valley at 1,550m altitude, a mountain village where each stay is private but the land is shared. Drag to compare seasons.

moments.morningCoffee: Morning coffee on the porch with mountain views
